tests.test_utils
================

.. py:module:: tests.test_utils


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   tests.test_utils.test_student_blocked_from_admin_panel
   tests.test_utils.test_guest_blocked_from_home


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: test_student_blocked_from_admin_panel(client)

   A logged-in student should NOT be able to access the admin portal.


.. py:function:: test_guest_blocked_from_home(client)

   An unauthenticated user should be redirected to login.
